title: Xenial Molten British Mushroom Cottage Pie
description: A vegetarian friendly British dish featuring umami flavors and Sichuan pepper, served in a wooden board vessel. This adventurous cottage pie combines molten goodness with earthy mushroom flavors.

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: mixed varieties such as cremini and shiitake

ingredients.name: bonito flakes
ingredients.notes: vegetarian friendly substitute for bonito shave

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the mixed mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Stir in the ground Sichuan pepper and bonito flakes.
Add the low sodium vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook for 10 minutes.
Prepare the mashed potatoes according to package instructions.
In a separate bowl, combine the shredded cheddar cheese and cooked mushroom mixture.
Transfer the mushroom mixture to a wooden board vessel.
Top the mushroom mixture with the prepared mashed potatoes.
Bake the cottage pie in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
